message:
fix: multi-agent changes — watch waiter fix, CLI color sink, obligation ID normalization, scan Unpin removal, DNS connect refactor, rustfmt

Watch channel (SwiftWaterfall): extract poll_changed() to share waker logic
  between ChangedFuture and WatchStream, preventing waiter loss on poll_next.

CLI progress (SapphireStone): detect terminal state on actual stderr sink
  instead of stdout; add should_colorize_for() parameterized API.

Obligation table (CloudyElk): normalize stored record.id to canonical
  arena-assigned slot in both insert() and insert_with().

Stream scan: remove unnecessary Unpin bound on Scan's Stream impl
  since inner stream is #[pin] via pin_project.

DNS resolver (DarkBarn): refactor try_connect_timeout to use runtime's
  TcpStream::connect_timeout_with_time_getter instead of blocking thread.

GF256: add profile pack env request truthfulness test.

Also: rustfmt across all touched files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
